subtopics.title: Biblical Account of Creation
common_misconceptions: The two creation accounts contradict each other
Creation is only about the physical world
subtopics.teaching_note: Explore the theological significance of creation. Discuss man's role as steward of creation.

subtopics.title: The Fall of Man
common_misconceptions: The Fall only affected Adam and Eve
God was surprised by the Fall
subtopics.teaching_note: Discuss the consequences of the Fall on humanity and creation. Explore themes of temptation, disobedience, and redemption.

subtopics.title: Abraham: Father of Faith
common_misconceptions: Abraham had perfect faith from the start
The Abrahamic covenant was conditional on works
subtopics.teaching_note: Trace Abraham's journey of faith. Discuss the significance of God's covenant with Abraham.

subtopics.title: Joseph and His Brothers
common_misconceptions: Joseph boasted to spite his brothers
Joseph's suffering was punishment
subtopics.teaching_note: Emphasize themes of forgiveness and God's providence. Show how Joseph's suffering led to salvation for his family.

subtopics.title: The Call and Commission of Moses
common_misconceptions: Moses willingly accepted God's call immediately
The plagues were natural events
subtopics.teaching_note: Discuss Moses' reluctance and God's patience. Explain the significance of the Passover.

subtopics.title: Exodus and Wilderness Wanderings
common_misconceptions: Israelites wandered because of poor navigation
The Ten Commandments were the only laws given
subtopics.teaching_note: Explore the covenant relationship at Sinai. Discuss the implications of breaking covenant through idolatry.

subtopics.title: Major Prophets
common_misconceptions: Prophets only predicted the future
Old Testament prophets are irrelevant today
subtopics.teaching_note: Explain the roles of prophets as messengers, teachers, and reformers. Connect messianic prophecies to Jesus.

subtopics.title: Minor Prophets
common_misconceptions: Minor prophets are less important than major prophets
The books are called minor due to their message
subtopics.teaching_note: Explain that 'minor' refers to length, not importance. Discuss themes of social justice and true worship.

subtopics.title: Birth and Early Ministry of Jesus
common_misconceptions: Jesus' ministry was only about miracles
Jesus came to abolish the Old Testament law
subtopics.teaching_note: Trace Jesus' ministry through the Gospels. Explain the central message of the Kingdom of God.

subtopics.title: Death and Resurrection of Jesus
common_misconceptions: Jesus was a victim of circumstances
Resurrection was spiritual, not physical
subtopics.teaching_note: Emphasize the voluntary nature of Jesus' sacrifice. Discuss the significance of the resurrection for Christian faith.

subtopics.title: Pentecost and the Spread of the Gospel
common_misconceptions: Paul founded Christianity
The early church had no problems
subtopics.teaching_note: Trace the growth of the church from Jerusalem to the Gentile world. Discuss the role of the Holy Spirit.

subtopics.title: Paul's Epistles and Teachings
common_misconceptions: Paul taught against the law of Moses entirely
Grace means law is irrelevant
subtopics.teaching_note: Explain Paul's theology of grace and faith. Discuss the relevance of his teachings for modern Christians.
